economic_ownership_map.label: Mid-cycle burn-in / test systems owner-cash engine
economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Mid-cycle burn-in / test systems owner-cash engine

low.label: FY2025 net cash from operating activities
Mid-cycle normalized owner free cash flow per diluted share
low.rationale: Two-year average FY2023–FY2024 free cash flow per share anchors mid-cycle; FY2025 trough ($0.42/sh cash burn) bounds bear.

low.label: Growth years 1–5 on normalized owner cash
low.rationale: SiC / AI burn-in recovery vs customer pause after FY2024 peak.

low.label: Growth years 6–7 on normalized owner cash
low.rationale: Long-run fade after implant cycle normalization.

low.label: Selling multiple on year-7 owner cash
low.rationale: Specialty equipment multiple band; bear trough persistence, bull mid-cycle re-rating.

low.label: Discount rate on owner cash path
Schedule adjustment to legacy component targets
low.rationale: Scales raw DCF to filing-grounded component schedule without changing overlap keys.

low.label: cash_pv
low.formula: present_value(owner_cash_y1, 1, owner_cash_y2, 2, owner_cash_y3, 3, owner_cash_y4, 4, owner_cash_y5, 5, owner_cash_y6, 6, discount_rate)

economic_ownership_map.evidence: Primary bridge from AEHR/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20250728_rpt20250530_acc0001654954_25_008553.htm: FY2025 revenue $58.968M, OCF $-7.4M, capex $4.992M, cash $24.529M; contract backfill 2026-07-23.
economic_ownership_map.tax_and_realization_adjustments: FY2025 trough cash burn ($0.42/sh) bounds bear case; SiC recovery assumptions cite partial nine-month FY2026 net income $8.5M.
economic_ownership_map.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or cycle path is materially worse than low case.

economic_ownership_map.ownership_claim: Net cash and financial claims per share

low.label: Net financial claim on common equity after operating liquidity reserve
low.rationale: Debt-free balance sheet; low case reserves working capital tied to backlog decline; high case credits excess cash net of small lease claims.

base.label: Net financial claim on common equity after operating liquidity reserve
base.rationale: Debt-free balance sheet; low case reserves working capital tied to backlog decline; high case credits excess cash net of small lease claims.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Power Zones select the fitting economic method and eligible independent reviewers; they never choose the valuation answer or capital decision.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Deferred revenue and customer deposit conversion option
Cycle, customer concentration, and dilution reserve

required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
